description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular shelving unit with a modern, geometric design. The front features a series of horizontal slats or bars, some of which are spaced to create open shelves of varying heights, while others form partial enclosures. The sides are solid and dark, contrasting with the lighter, striped front and back. The back panel also displays a striped pattern, but with a more uniform arrangement compared to the front. The legs are short and sturdy, elevating the unit slightly off the ground. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood and possibly metal, giving it a robust yet stylish appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with striped front and back panels, open shelves, and solid dark sides. Its geometric design and mixed materials make it visually striking and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped slat design with open shelves of varying heights and partial enclosures.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a solid, dark panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a uniform striped pattern, with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, dark panel.
